shadcn-html / descriptions

Built with: CSS

Descriptions

A key-value display for metadata and details. Built on the native <dl> description list element.

Component Specification — components/descriptions/descriptions.md

Native basis

<dl> (description list) element with <dt> (term) and <dd> (details) pairs.

Web Platform APIs

<dl> <dt> <dd>

Classes

.descriptions .descriptions-item .descriptions-term .descriptions-detail

Data attributes

• data-layout — values: horizontal

Accessibility

• <dl> is natively accessible — screen readers announce term-detail associations

• Wrapping <dt>/<dd> pairs in <div> is valid HTML and aids styling

Vertical (Default)

Terms stacked above their details.

Name
Jordan Davis
Email
jdavis@email.com
Role
Administrator
Status
Active
<dl class="descriptions">
  <div class="descriptions-item">
    <dt class="descriptions-term">Name</dt>
    <dd class="descriptions-detail">Jordan Davis</dd>
  </div>
</dl>

Horizontal

Terms beside details in a row layout.

Name
Jordan Davis
Email
jdavis@email.com
Phone
+1 (555) 123-4567
Address
123 Main St, Springfield, IL 62701
<dl class="descriptions" data-layout="horizontal">
  <div class="descriptions-item">
    <dt class="descriptions-term">Name</dt>
    <dd class="descriptions-detail">Jordan Davis</dd>
  </div>
</dl>

CSS view file

Styles for the descriptions component. Uses design tokens for colors, spacing, and radius.

@layer components {
  .descriptions {
    margin: 0;
    padding: 0;
    font-size: 0.875rem;
  }

  .descriptions-item {
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    gap: 0.125rem;
    padding: 0.75rem 0;
    border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);

    &:last-child {
      border-bottom: none;
    }
  }

  .descriptions[data-layout="horizontal"] .descriptions-item {
    flex-direction: row;
    gap: 1rem;
  }

  .descriptions-term {
    font-weight: 500;
    color: var(--foreground);
    font-size: 0.8125rem;
    flex-shrink: 0;
  }

  .descriptions[data-layout="horizontal"] .descriptions-term {
    width: 10rem;
  }

  .descriptions-detail {
    margin: 0;
    color: var(--muted-foreground);
    line-height: 1.5;
  }
}
